states.name: Kana
states.title: Elysian Shadow
states.description:
Kana Narukami and her little sister Mirai were born with cat ears and a tail, in a world that was mostly human. 

Their parents took this as a sign of good fortune. Only those especially close to the Goddess took on the traits of an animal. Both sisters shared a cat's grace, its speed, as well as its knack for survival. Every time their poor family pulled through misfortune, their mother credited it to her daughters' blessings from the Goddess. 

One day, that blessing revealed itself as the curse it truly was. 

If she'd known Mirai's voice was that of the Goddess herself, Kana would never let her sing at all.

states.name: Kana
states.title: Elysian Shadow
states.description:
Men in black suits snatched Mirai off the street one morning as she sang for pennies from strangers. They told Kana they were from the Church, and thanked her for keeping a Vessel safe for so long. When Kana sank her teeth into the men taking her sister away, they knocked her out and left her there for Fate to do what it would. 

After a few hours, she woke up and did what any cat would do. She sought out food and shelter. She stayed in the shadows. She wore a mask to hide her horrid pain. 

She adapted. She survived, because she knew it was the only way she would ever get her sister back. 

And at long last, she thinks she's found a way.
